examples: At last, I hear a soft thud, a gasp, and silence.
It was the eyes that made Mr. Craven gasp for breath.
When people don't get enough oxygen, they often begin to gasp for air.
Especially when we realise that gasp-inducing Italian super-deli Valvona and Crolla (valvonacrolla.co.uk) is only a stagger away.
But this strategy is guaranteed to elicit a gasp from the most cosmopolitan of parents.
